'''wavuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huaca|huaca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huaca|huaca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wavuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wævikith|wævikith]] || [[word:wævikij|wævikij]] || [[word:wævikish|wævikish]] || [[word:wæviki|wæviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wavuvukuth|wavuvukuth]] || [[word:wavuvukuj|wavuvukuj]] || [[word:wavuvukush|wavuvukush]] || [[word:wavuvuku|wavuvuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wavukuth|wavukuth]] || [[word:wavukuj|wavukuj]] || [[word:wavukush|wavukush]] || [[word:wavuku|wavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wavufkuth|wavufkuth]] || [[word:wavufkuj|wavufkuj]] || [[word:wavufkush|wavufkush]] || [[word:wavufkuf|wavufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wavukuthu|wavukuthu]] || [[word:wavukuju|wavukuju]] || [[word:wavukushu|wavukushu]] || [[word:wavukuku|wavukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wavukuth|wavukuth]] || [[word:wavukuj|wavukuj]] || [[word:wavukush|wavukush]] || [[word:wavuku|wavuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wavukuthul|wavukuthul]] || [[word:wavukujul|wavukujul]] || [[word:wavukushul|wavukushul]] || [[word:wavukukul|wavukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wavukuthuthu|wavukuthuthu]] || [[word:wavukujuju|wavukujuju]] || [[word:wavukushushu|wavukushushu]] || [[word:wavukuku|wavukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wavukuthun|wavukuthun]] || [[word:wavukujun|wavukujun]] || [[word:wavukushun|wavukushun]] || [[word:wavukukun|wavukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wavukuthuoro|wavukuthuoro]] || [[word:wavukujuoro|wavukujuoro]] || [[word:wavukushuoro|wavukushuoro]] || [[word:wavukukuoro|wavukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
